name: puerarin
summary: Puerarin is the major isoflavone linked to kudzu-derived materials and has been studied in vascular, metabolic, and estrogen-related contexts. Human evidence exists, especially in Asia, but it is narrower and less replicated than the strongest compound-level.
description: Major kudzu isoflavone linked to metabolic and estrogen-related signaling.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
